select.isEqual: SELECT A.ContainerID , B.ContainerTypeName$lang$ ContainerTypeName, B.ContainerTypeID FROM tbContainer A JOIN tbContainerType B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.ContainerTypeID = B.ContainerTypeID JOIN tbContainerUseDep C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.ContainerID = C.ContainerID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND C.UseDepID = #myDeptID# AND A.ContainerOwnDepID = #useDeptID# ORDER BY B.ContainerTypeID

SELECT A.ContainerID , B.ContainerTypeName$lang$ ContainerTypeName, B.ContainerTypeID , A.ContainerOwnDepID FROM tbContainer A JOIN tbContainerType B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.ContainerTypeID = B.ContainerTypeID JOIN tbContainerUseDep C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.ContainerID = C.ContainerID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND C.UseDepID = #myDeptID# AND A.ContainerOwnDepID <> #myDeptID# ORDER BY A.ContainerOwnDepID, B.ContainerTypeID

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ContainerID , B.ContainerTypeName$lang$ ContainerTypeName , B.ContainerTypeID FROM tbContainer A, tbContainerType B WHERE A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.ContainerTypeID = B.ContainerTypeID AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.ContainerOwnDepID = #myDeptID# ORDER BY B.ContainerTypeID

SELECT B.ItemCode ,
D.itemname itemname
D.itemname itemname2
FROM TBENDAPRDOCINFO A JOIN TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.DocID = B.DocID JOIN tbContainer C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.ContainerID = C.ContainerID JOIN TBDOCNUM_ITEM D ON B.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND B.ItemCode = D.itemcode WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.DelFlag IS NULL AND ( B.ItemCode IS NOT NULL ) AND ( B.ItemCode <> '' ) AND ( A.ContainerID IN ( SELECT F.ContainerID FROM tbContainer F LEFT JOIN tbContainerUseDep E ON F.tenant_id = E.tenant_id AND F.ContainerID = E.ContainerID WHERE F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ( F.ContainerOwnDepID = #deptID# ) OR ( E.UseDepID = #deptID# ) ) )
GROUP BY B.ItemCode, D.itemname
GROUP BY B.ItemCode, D.itemname2
ORDER BY B.ItemCode
SELECT USERCONTID , USERCONTNAME , DESCRIPTION FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #parentContID# AND OWNUSERID = #userID# ORDER BY USERCONTNAME
SELECT DEPTCONTID , DEPTCONTNAME , DESCRIPTION , SN , MANAGEUSERID FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #parentContID# AND OWNDEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY SN, DEPTCONTNAME
SELECT count(*) FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #userID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #deptContID#

SELECT CONTAINERID FROM TBCONTAINER A INNER JOIN TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.CONTAINERTYPEID = B.CONTAINERTYPEID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.DOCUMENTSTATE IN (#staDSPumYui#, #staDSBalSin#) AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#

SELECT CONTAINERID FROM tbContainer A JOIN TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.ContainerTypeID = B.ContainerTypeID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.DocumentState = #staDSBansong# AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#
SELECT DEPTID , CONTTYPE , SN , CONTNAME , SUBQUERY FROM TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY CONTTYPE, SN
SELECT ISUSE FROM TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #code1# AND CODE2 = #code2#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($userIDs$)

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID = #userID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID = #userID#

SELECT COUNT(A.DOCID) FROM TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A INNER JOIN TBAPRDOCINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.DOCID = B.DOCID INNER JOIN TBEXPAPRDOCINFO C ON C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND C.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND C.DOCID = B.DOCID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.PROCESSORID = #userID# AND (A.APRSTATE = #staASJinHang# OR A.APRSTATE = #staASBanSong#) AND A.PROCESSYN <> 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(SN) FROM TBTMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #userID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($userIDs$)

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS COUNT FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($userIDs$) AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID = #userID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #userID# AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A INNER JOIN TBAPRDOCINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.DOCID = B.DOCID INNER JOIN TBEXPAPRDOCINFO C ON C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND C.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND C.DOCID = B.DOCID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.PROCESSYN <> ''Y'' AND (((A.PROCESSORID = #userID#) AND (A.APRSTATE = #staASJiJung# OR A.APRSTATE = #staASWheSong))
(A.ReceivedDeptID = #userDeptID# AND A.AprState IN (#staASDoJak#, #staASBaeBu#)) OR (A.ReceivedDeptID = #userDeptID# AND A.AprState = #staASWheSong#)
) AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO.DOCID) FROM TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A INNER JOIN TBAPRDOCINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.DOCID = B.DOCID INNER JOIN TBEXPAPRDOCINFO C ON C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND C.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND C.DOCID = B.DOCID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.PROCESSORID = #userID# AND (A.APRSTATE = #staASJinHang# OR A.APRSTATE = #staASBanSong#) AND A.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.DOCID) FROM TBENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBENDAPRLINEINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.DOCID = B.DOCID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBEXPENDAPRLINE C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.DOCID = C.DOCID INNER JOIN TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID AND A.DOCID = D.DOCID WHERE B.APRMEMBERID = #userID# AND D.DELFLAG IS NULL AND B.AprType = 'A03040' AND B.AprState = 'A04002' AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(SN) FROM TBTMPAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND OWNERID = #userID# AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERID, CASE WHEN APRMEMBERNAME$strLang$ IS NULL THEN '' ELSE APRMEMBERNAME$strLang$ END APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTID, HREF, DOCTITLE, FUNCTIONTYPE, DOCSTATE, CASE WHEN WRITERNAME$strLang$ IS NULL THEN '' ELSE WRITERNAME$strLang$ END WRITERNAME, '0' AS RECEIVESN FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($userIDs$)
$subQuery$
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #listCount#

isNotEqual.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DOCID, CASE WHEN WRITERNAME$strLang$ IS NULL THEN '' ELSE WRITERNAME$strLang$ END WRITERNAME, HREF, DOCTITLE, HASOPINIONYN FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID = #userID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1
$subQuery$
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #listCount#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, CASE WHEN WRITERNAME$strLang$ IS NULL THEN '' ELSE WRITERNAME$strLang$ END WRITERNAME, HREF, DOCTITLE, HASOPINIONYN, STARTDATE FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE APRMEMBERID = #userID#
$subQuery$
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #listCount#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT B.DOCID, B.HREF, CASE WHEN A.SENTDEPTNAME$strLang$ IS NULL THEN '' ELSE A.SENTDEPTNAME$strLang$ END SENTDEPTNAME, B.DOCTITLE, A.DOCSTATE, A.APRSTATE, B.HASOPINIONYN FROM TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A INNER JOIN TBAPRDOCINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.DOCID = B.DOCID INNER JOIN TBEXPAPRDOCINFO C ON C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND C.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND C.DOCID = B.DOCID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.PROCESSYN <> 'Y' AND (((A.PROCESSORID = #userID#) AND (A.APRSTATE = #staASJiJung# OR A.APRSTATE = #staASWheSong#))
(A.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #userDeptID# AND A.APRSTATE IN (#staASDoJak#, #staASBaeBu#)) OR (A.RECEIVEDDEPTID = #userDeptID# AND A.APRSTATE = #staASWheSong#)
)
$subQuery$
ORDER BY PROCESSDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #listCount#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT B.DOCID, B.HREF, B.HASOPINIONYN, B.DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN B.WRITERNAME$strLang$ IS NULL THEN '' ELSE B.WRITERNAME$strLang$ END WRITERNAME, B.ORGDOCID, A.DocState , A.AprState FROM TBAPRRECEIPTPROCESSINFO A INNER JOIN TBAPRDOCINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.DOCID = B.DOCID INNER JOIN TBEXPAPRDOCINFO C ON C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND C.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND C.DOCID = B.DOCID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.PROCESSORID = #userID# AND (A.APRSTATE = #staASJinHang# OR A.APRSTATE = #staASBanSong#) AND A.PROCESSYN <> 'Y'
$subQuery$
ORDER BY PROCESSDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #listCount#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT DOCID, APRMEMBERID, CASE WHEN APRMEMBERNAME$strLang$ IS NULL THEN '' ELSE APRMEMBERNAME$strLang$ END APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTID, HREF, DOCTITLE, FUNCTIONTYPE, DOCSTATE, CASE WHEN B.WRITERNAME$strLang$ IS NULL THEN '' ELSE B.WRITERNAME$strLang$ END WRITERNAME, '0' AS RECEIVESN FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($userIDs$)
$subQuery$
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #listCount#

sqlMap.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(usercontid), '0000000000') + 1 FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBUSERCONT ( USERCONTID, USERCONTNAME, PARENTCONTID, DESCRIPTION, OWNUSERID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxContainerID#, #userContName#, #parentContID#, #description#, #userID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT NVL(MAX(deptcontid), '0000000000') + 1 FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBDEPTCONT ( DEPTCONTID, DEPTCONTNAME, PARENTCONTID, SN, DESCRIPTION, OWNDEPTID, MANAGEUSERID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxContainerID#, #deptContName#, #parentContID#, #sn#, #description#, #deptID#, #manageUserID#, #tenantID# )
